Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Appearance Of Plaintiff James F. Berger At Deposition
Off Calendar May-30-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Pacifica Care Center's motion to compel the appearance of plaintiff James Berger at deposition.
The motion is ordered off calendar as it was not timely noticed. CCP Section 1005, requires that motions be served and filed 16 court days prior to the hearing, with five calendar days added if the motion was served by mail. The motion was filed on May 4, 2007. If the motion is re-filed, Defendant shall also comply with San Francisco Superior Court Rule 10 C (1). COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
